name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-61
title: install.py: when source .claude not at script_dir and download fails, leaves partial state
description: install.py main() lines 77-92: when .claude is not present in script_dir, downloads tarball to tmp_dir. If extraction succeeds but shutil.copytree later (line 95) raises (e.g., partial existing .claude in target), the finally block at 119-121 cleans tmp_dir but the partial .claude in target is left orphaned. Recommend checking-then-copying with try/except around copytree and rollback on failure (rmtree of target/.claude if it was newly created by this run).

history.note: wave-4 cleanup; fixed in e10610a (impl) and 91f2c68 (tests)
